name: HidraSim Geant4 DevContainer
postCreateCommand:
mkdir -p /opt/geant4/data && /opt/geant4/bin/geant4-config --install-datasets && if ! grep -q 'terminal-welcome.sh' ~/.bashrc; then echo -e '
# Show dev container welcome only for interactive shells
if [[ $- == *i* ]] && [ -f /workspace/.devcontainer/terminal-welcome.sh ]; then
  bash /workspace/.devcontainer/terminal-welcome.sh
fi' >> ~/.bashrc; fi
